column3: If a new device stops working, the repair should be free.
A device should be strong enough to survive a fall.
Devices with a large variety of functions may confuse some users.
Most people prefer devices that can serve many different purposes.
If a device is too expensive, most people will just do without.
The appearance od a device is an important feature for some.
We should learn how two use a device before attempting to use it.
